## Status Legend

| Status | Symbol | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| pending | ⏳ | Waiting to start |
| in_progress | 🔄 | Working |
| blocked | 🚫 | Waiting for dependency |
| deferred | ⏸️ | Paused by human |
| completed | ✅ | Done |
| cancelled | ❌ | Stopped |

---
